contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Fix Sophia credential-vault durability + cross-process cache coherence
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/214
  
  Details:
  Diagnosed and fixed two independent bugs in Sophia's (truesight_autopilot) encrypted credential vault that caused the 2026-06-15 'vault wiped / shows empty' incidents.
  1) Durability: vault dir (/opt/truesight_autopilot/vault) lived inside the deploy tree and was NOT in .gitignore, so deploy.sh's 'git clean -fd' deleted the Fernet key + all 31 credentials. Added 'vault/' to the existing runtime-dirs gitignore section (git clean respects .gitignore). No relocation / no key re-encryption.
  2) Cache coherence: Vault cached decrypted entries per-process and loaded disk once; the separate vault web worker (was --workers 2) never saw writes from other processes (CLI / main bot), so the page showed empty after credentials were re-added. Added (mtime,size)-based reload so any instance reflects external writes; dropped the vault worker to --workers 1.
  Added 3 cross-process regression tests (verified they fail on the pre-fix path). Vault suites green (46 + 8). Merged in PR #214.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
